original_image_tags: Back of a yellowish, aged paper document. The paper shows significant bleed-through of typed text from the other side, which appears reversed and faint. Two black hole-punches are visible at the top. Several red and black date stamps and filing notations are applied over the bleed-through text. The paper has torn edges at the top right.

elements.description: Faint yellowed page showing mirrored reverse text (ghosting) and multiple ink stamps at the bottom, including: 'MAY 7 1969', 'REC'D BISHOP FBI', 'MAY 10 41 AM '69', 'MAY 7 4 24 PM '69', 'RECEIVED FBI REC'DOR', 'MAY 7 11 11 AM '69 REC'D DELOACH FBI', and 'REC'D-READING ROOM FBI MAY 7 3 36 PM '69'. Two punch holes at the top.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text for multiple stamps that Description A does not mention at all, indicating one side is fabricating detailed text that the other side does not see.
